item.title: How to Forge a Useful Household Item
item.description: Learn the step-by-step process of forging a practical household tool from raw metal. A clear demonstration of blacksmithing techniques for everyday use.

media:content.media:title: How to Forge a Useful Household Item
media:content.media:description: Learn the step-by-step process of forging a practical household tool from raw metal. A clear demonstration of blacksmithing techniques for everyday use.

item.title: Building a Shepherd’s Axe by Hand
item.description: Watch the process of building a traditional shepherd’s axe from raw steel, highlighting forging, shaping, and finishing techniques used in blacksmithing.

media:content.media:title: Building a Shepherd’s Axe by Hand
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of building a traditional shepherd’s axe from raw steel, highlighting forging, shaping, and finishing techniques used in blacksmithing.

item.title: Not Every Wooden-Handled Tool Is a Hammer
item.description: Explore the difference between tools that look like hammers but serve other purposes. Learn how design and function define each tool in practical use.

media:content.media:title: Not Every Wooden-Handled Tool Is a Hammer
media:content.media:description: Explore the difference between tools that look like hammers but serve other purposes. Learn how design and function define each tool in practical use.

item.title: Making a Knife from an Old File
item.description: Watch the process of transforming an old metal file into a functional knife, including shaping, grinding, and finishing techniques used in metalworking.

media:content.media:title: Making a Knife from an Old File
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of transforming an old metal file into a functional knife, including shaping, grinding, and finishing techniques used in metalworking.

item.title: Best Method for Forging Square Tubing
item.description: Watch a practical method for forging square tubing with controlled heat and hammering techniques. See how blacksmithing skills shape steel with precision and strength.

media:content.media:title: Best Method for Forging Square Tubing
media:content.media:description: Watch a practical method for forging square tubing with controlled heat and hammering techniques. See how blacksmithing skills shape steel with precision and strength.

item.title: Forging a New Mexican-Style Candle Sconce
item.description: Watch the step-by-step process of forging a New Mexican-inspired candle sconce, combining traditional metalworking techniques with decorative design for home décor.

media:content.media:title: Forging a New Mexican-Style Candle Sconce
media:content.media:description: Watch the step-by-step process of forging a New Mexican-inspired candle sconce, combining traditional metalworking techniques with decorative design for home décor.

item.title: Blacksmithing Creativity on a Shoestring Budget
item.description: See how a blacksmith crafts impressive projects with limited materials, showcasing innovative techniques and creative problem-solving on a tight budget.

media:content.media:title: Blacksmithing Creativity on a Shoestring Budget
media:content.media:description: See how a blacksmith crafts impressive projects with limited materials, showcasing innovative techniques and creative problem-solving on a tight budget.

item.title: Making a Holdfast | Blacksmithing
item.description: Watch a blacksmith forge a traditional holdfast from hot steel. See the heating, bending, and shaping process used to create this classic woodworking tool.

media:content.media:title: Making a Holdfast | Blacksmithing
media:content.media:description: Watch a blacksmith forge a traditional holdfast from hot steel. See the heating, bending, and shaping process used to create this classic woodworking tool.

item.title: Forging a Wrapped Eye Axe Pt 2
item.description: Watch part two of forging a wrapped eye axe. See the detailed blacksmithing process as the axe head takes shape through skilled hammer work.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Wrapped Eye Axe Pt 2
media:content.media:description: Watch part two of forging a wrapped eye axe. See the detailed blacksmithing process as the axe head takes shape through skilled hammer work.

item.title: Forging a Spatula | Blacksmithing
item.description: Watch the blacksmithing process of forging a functional spatula. See the heating, hammering, and shaping that turns raw steel into a useful kitchen tool.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Spatula | Blacksmithing
media:content.media:description: Watch the blacksmithing process of forging a functional spatula. See the heating, hammering, and shaping that turns raw steel into a useful kitchen tool.

item.title: Gas Saver Valve for Torch
item.description: Learn how a gas saver valve works with a torch. See how this simple tool helps reduce gas use, improve efficiency, and make shop work more convenient.

media:content.media:title: Gas Saver Valve for Torch
media:content.media:description: Learn how a gas saver valve works with a torch. See how this simple tool helps reduce gas use, improve efficiency, and make shop work more convenient.
